channel.title: CodeCosts Blog
channel.description: AI coding tool news, pricing updates, and analysis. Compare GitHub Copilot, Cursor, Windsurf, Claude Code, and more.

item.title: Cursor Pro vs Business: Is the Upgrade Worth It for Your Team?
item.description: Cursor Pro costs $20/mo. Business costs $40/seat. The AI is identical — we compare admin tools, SSO, compliance, team costs, and tell you when Business is worth the 2x premium.

item.title: Claude Code vs Cursor for AI Agents: Which Is Better for Autonomous Coding?
item.description: Terminal agent vs IDE agent. Full comparison of Claude Code and Cursor agent features, pricing, parallel execution, and use cases.

item.title: GitHub Copilot Pro vs Pro+: Is the $39/mo Plan Worth It?
item.description: Pro costs $10/mo with 300 premium requests. Pro+ costs $39/mo with 1,500. Break-even math, feature comparison, and clear recommendation.

item.title: Cheapest AI Coding Tool in 2026: Cost-Per-Feature Breakdown
item.description: We compared every AI coding tool by cost per feature — completions, chat, agent mode. Here's which tool gives the most value per dollar in 2026.

item.title: Cursor Now Works in JetBrains IDEs + Self-Hosted Agents for Enterprise
item.description: Cursor expanded to JetBrains via ACP, launched self-hosted cloud agents, and shipped Composer 2. Full breakdown of what changed and what it costs.

item.title: Gemini Code Assist Free Tier: 90x More Completions Than Copilot Free
item.description: 180,000 vs 2,000 completions per month. Full comparison of Gemini Code Assist Free and GitHub Copilot Free for 2026.

item.title: GitHub Copilot Will Train on Your Code by Default — How to Opt Out
item.description: Starting April 24, GitHub will use Free, Pro, and Pro+ user data to train AI models. Here's how to opt out before the deadline.

item.title: Windsurf Kills Credits, Moves to Quotas — Developer Backlash Explained
item.description: Windsurf replaced its credit system with daily/weekly quotas and raised Pro from $15 to $20/mo. Full breakdown and comparison.

item.title: The Hidden Costs of AI Coding Tools: What the Pricing Page Won't Tell You
item.description: Premium request limits, overage charges, seat minimums, and the gotchas that turn a $20/month tool into a $50+ expense.

item.title: AI Coding Tools: What Changed in March 2026
item.description: Monthly roundup: Copilot agent mode, Cursor Ultra, Windsurf enterprise, Claude Code updates, and what it means for your wallet.
